message:
feat(python): numpy.ascontiguousarray wrapper parity (franken_numpy-0ktc)

Adds a passthrough wrapper for numpy.ascontiguousarray(a, dtype=None)
so the returned array is always C-contiguous with numpy's
copy-when-needed semantics. Test covers already-contiguous 2-D input,
transposed (non-contiguous) input getting copied, explicit dtype
promotion with dtype parity, default dtype preservation, Python list
to ndarray conversion, and 1-D input handling.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
